phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest wall entrance is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la entrada más cercana a las murallas?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah ehn-TRAH-dah mahs sehr-KAH-nah ah lahs moo-RAH-yahs?

likely_response.local: Suba por la Torre Gironella, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah POHR LAH TOHR-reh hee-roh-NEHL-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Via the main staircase, on the right.

responses.english: Via the main staircase, on the right.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah POHR LAH TOHR-reh hee-roh-NEHL-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Suba por la Torre Gironella, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the wall walkway is open today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿está abierto el paseo de muralla hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, es-TAH ah-BYER-to el pa-SEH-o de moo-RAH-yah oy?

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the entrance.

responses.english: It is indicated at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the viewing towers are
phrases.text_local: ¿En qué dirección están las torres de vigilancia?
phrases.pronunciation: en keh dee-rek-THYOHN es-TAHN las TOH-rrehs deh vee-hee-LAN-syah?

likely_response.local: Suba las escaleras hacia Torre Gironella.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs ah-THEE-ah TOHR-reh hee-roh-NEHL-lah
likely_response.translation_en: There are towers at both ends of the route.

responses.english: There are towers at both ends of the route.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs ah-THEE-ah TOHR-reh hee-roh-NEHL-lah
responses.french: Suba las escaleras hacia Torre Gironella.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which way to walk the complete route
phrases.text_local: ¿Cuál es el mejor sentido para recorrer la muralla?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿kwahl ehs el meh-KHOR sen-TEE-doh PAH-rah reh-koh-RERR lah moo-RAH-yah?

likely_response.local: Empiece desde la plaza de la Catedral.
likely_response.pronunciation: ehm-pee-EH-theh DEH-sdeh LAH PLAH-thah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL

responses.phonetic: ehm-pee-EH-theh DEH-sdeh LAH PLAH-thah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL
responses.french: Empiece desde la plaza de la Catedral.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get a map of the walls
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo conseguir un mapa de las murallas?
phrases.pronunciation: DON-deh PWEH-doh kohn-seh-GEER oon MAH-pah deh lahs moo-RAH-yahs?

likely_response.local: En la oficina de turismo, justo allí.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH too-REE-smoh HOO-stoh ahl-LÍ
likely_response.translation_en: At the tourist office, right there.

responses.english: At the tourist office, right there.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH too-REE-smoh HOO-stoh ahl-LÍ
responses.french: En la oficina de turismo, justo allí.
